query: SELECT u.id, u.name, u.email, u.role, u.clinicaId, c.nome as clinicaNome, c.codigo FROM users u LEFT JOIN clinicas c ON u.clinicaId = c.id WHERE u.name LIKE '%Fabiana%';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3v7At4WPQpm4aRf.9e6a8ae0e28e --database bSA4q7aMJsJeSmafooCq7A --execute SELECT u.id, u.name, u.email, u.role, u.clinicaId, c.nome as clinicaNome, c.codigo FROM users u LEFT JOIN clinicas c ON u.clinicaId = c.id WHERE u.name LIKE '%Fabiana%';
